horoscope: Today's transits support heartfelt pursuits, dear Aries. There can be a comfortable intensity in your interactions, and emotions and thoughts drive creative efforts. Emotional self-honesty can push you in the right direction. The changes you make with friends or associates are a step in the right direction, likely with long-term benefits. Good energy is with you for dreaming, wishing, and planting some seeds for the future. Personal magnetism runs high, and winning favor is in the cards now. Recent problems with others can be handled more easily and honestly today. You’re not inclined to sweep things under the rug, preferring to tackle issues at their root.

You can become caught up in an enjoyable pursuit today, dear Taurus. You’re seeking something meaningful to put your heart into, and with this motivation, you can accomplish and uncover a lot. You're in great shape for getting your bearings, but also making improvements or gaining new insight. You are more disciplined than usual, so take advantage! Support is there if you need it, possibly from an unusual or hidden source, or your own feelings emerge from deep within, guiding you. A surprise and strong attraction or interest can be brewing! You might find a good reason to put the work you did in the past to use today, and it serves as a boost. You could also gain new insight into a past relationship or your feelings.

You might enjoy a building passion for an idea or a project today, dear Gemini. There can be intensely creative and romantic energies flowing now, and with this energy, you could be attracting (or attracted to) a special idea or person. You can enjoy good conversations today, and listening as much as you contribute is especially important now, as you can hear something that truly benefits you. It's a good day for feeling sharp, motivated, and optimistic for the future. Networking and friendships can be rich sources of information, enjoyment, or even inspiration today. You can feel passionately about an idea, cause, or belief, and you might bond with others through this excitement. A sense of inner well-being today can come from making plans for the future that inspire growth and hope. Plans involving education, learning, or adventure can come together well. It's a fine time to gather strength through your connections, long-term pursuits, and happiness goals.

Today's transits are strong for getting the support or backing you need to advance your goals, dear Cancer, or for increased personal conviction. It's a good time to enhance or repair relationships, whether in your personal or professional life. You can be quite motivated to work through problems or to do some valuable research. Putting your energy into heartfelt pursuits can be most productive and satisfying. There are treasures to be found when you dig a little deeper today. There can be intense but pleasant attractions. It's a good time for enhancing or repairing relationships, and this can include intimate ones and those with superiors or associates as well.

Strategy is important today, dear Leo, and it's enjoyable to make plans. Your feelings about a person or even a project or idea tend to intensify most pleasantly. You might get the opportunity to repair or enhance a relationship. Your negotiation skills are strong. While you want to see eye to eye, remaining sincere and honest at the same time makes it more worthwhile. Your energy is strong, along with your motivation and commitment. It's easier than usual to see your emotional or love priorities. You have much to learn and share with someone special.

Today's transits support throwing your energy into what you love, dear Virgo, and this can be distracting if what you love is not what you need to do! Relationships can be consuming in a mostly positive way, or you may enjoy wrapping your head around a mystery. There can be a project that you find especially absorbing and compelling today, and you may want to explore it further. Research efforts can bring good results, even if you don't get anywhere with them. Editing or otherwise going over business, health, and financial matters can be satisfying. Working with others to make a positive change can work well for you now. Pursuing heartfelt activities and building alliances are in special favor now. It's also a potentially potent time for money matters.

Today's transits boost your interactions, dear Libra, as well as your confidence. You might enjoy opportunities to advance or grow through your friendships or through group endeavors. There can be pleasant, rewarding contact. New insights into projects, a partnership, or a romantic relationship can come now, and these have long-term benefits. It's a fabulous time for one-on-one interactions and negotiations, as well as for repair and renewal, if needed, in a relationship. You're in terrific shape to follow a passion or strengthen a bond, even if there are some minor disconnects to navigate. Relationships improve with more focus, presence, and involvement.

Emotional energy today is strong but pleasant, dear Scorpio, with the Moon in your sign for the first part of the day, and Venus heading into a favorable aspect with your ruler, Pluto. You're coming across with added personal magnetism, and you're more confident and persuasive than usual. You're likely to magnetize good things to you, and you can feel that you're on track and heading in the right direction. There can be wonderful opportunities through work or regarding wellness. The focus is on eliminating, streamlining, and downsizing in positive ways, as this will give you a strong sense of organization and confidence. Family life is supportive.

Today's transits favor one-on-one relationships, dear Sagittarius, and they boost your enjoyment and influence related to your communications and projects. It's a good idea to reach out socially or professionally. It can be an excellent time for making a love connection and for charm, in general. Studying, learning, connecting, and creating are favored now. A Venus-Pluto sextile aspect influencing today brings you stronger feelings of enjoyment and influence. Others are admiring your intellect. Feelings of love or commitment can be communicated most warmly now. Others appreciate your style, company, and viewpoint.

It's a good day for new insights into your income and practical matters, dear Capricorn. It can be a fine time to make the most of what you already have and feel quite accomplished as a result. Energies favor income, gifts, and money matters right now. You're discovering your talents, resources, or skills, and as you feel more natural about them, opportunities pop up for you. A Venus-Pluto aspect influencing the day can also help you understand your needs more fully. It's a better time than usual for addressing problems, even those that seem especially sensitive or complex, since many of the day's benefits come from your ability to understand and face truths. Business intuition is excellent, and practical affairs thrive with a little strategy. Your appreciation builds for simple pleasures and comforts, as well as for familiar people and circumstances.

Today's energies are strong for connecting with a friend, possibly on a whole new level, dear Aquarius. Conversations stand out and can be satisfying now, and your communications go over particularly well. It's a good time for greater personal impact and appeal. Transits help you acknowledge, accept, and enjoy your feelings, even the deeper ones you don't always have time or energy to process. Focus on renewal, healing, and bonding in your relationships and communications for the best results now. The desire to contribute something of value or specialize and learn a topic more deeply can be a major motivator.

Today's transits are strong for paying special attention to your personal resources, dear Pisces. As Venus and Pluto move into harmony, building relationships can be valuable and rewarding. New insight into a venture can be motivating, or you feel more committed and on track with money, business, or practical affairs. By extension, you also feel more organized or empowered. Financial planning and handling are favored now, and the primary keys to success are building alliances, eliminating redundancies, and employing strategy. While it feels commitment-friendly, with Mercury still retrograde, it's best to wait and see. Still, you're getting to the heart of a matter. It can be a day of great engagement and inspiration.
